docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $796.85 FILED BY FONG,DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT DECAR FLEET MGMT. AVIS RENT A CAR SYSTEM,INC.WORLD HEADQUARTERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DECAR FLEET MGMT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG,DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DECAR FLEET MGMT. $796.85 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $851.85, AVIS NOT SERVED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DECAR FLEET MGMT.
